articles.title: Live updates: US says blockade of Iranian ports ‘fully implemented’ as Trump hints at further peace talks - CNN
articles.summary: The United States has fully implemented a blockade of Iranian ports, leading Iran’s military to threaten shipping in the Red Sea. President Trump suggested that peace talks could potentially resume this week in Pakistan. According to data from Kpler, two vessels that passed through the Strait of Hormuz recently stopped at the same location in the Gulf of Oman.
articles.description: Iran’s military has threatened shipping in the Red Sea if the US continues its blockade of Iranian ports, as President Donald Trump suggests talks could resume this week in Pakistan. Follow for live news updates.
